name: Chicken Adobo in Coconut Milk (Adobong Manok
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a saucepan and marinate for two hours.
2. Bring the mixture to a boil until the chicken is tender.
3. Separate the sauce from the chicken.
4. Broil the chicken until it is browned.
5. Reduce the sauce over moderate heat until it is reduced by half.
6. Pour the reduced sauce over the broiled chicken.
7. Serve hot with rice.
